title: The Third Sex
writer: Howard Bradford, Radclyffe Hall, Richard C. Kahn
actors: S. Dana Hubbard, Morgan Wallace, Luana Walters
plot: An exploitation film about homosexuality. The film is believed to be lost. Elinor Gordon, who was frightened sexually by a man while an infant, confides in her psychoanalyst that she is contemplating yielding to the advances of he...
